description_long: This object is a rectangular building structure with a flat roof almost entirely covered by blue solar panels, indicating its function as a solar energy infrastructure. The building has a beige exterior with a section featuring windows and doors, suggesting an operational or utility space. The roof is densely packed with solar panels arranged in a grid, and there are some visible rooftop components such as vents or small equipment housings. One side of the building displays the name 'Raltec', likely indicating the company or facility name. The structure appears robust, likely constructed from concrete or masonry, with metal framing supporting the solar panels. No visible cabling is apparent, and the solar panels are fixed in a flat orientation.
description: A beige rectangular building with a flat roof densely covered by blue solar panels and a section with windows and doors. The structure is robust, with the name 'Raltec' on one side and rooftop equipment visible.
description_view_0: This view shows the building from an angle highlighting the flat, blue solar panel-covered roof and the beige exterior walls.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the side with windows and doors, revealing the operational area beneath the solar panels.
description_view_2: This view displays the 'Raltec' signage on the building's side and the extensive solar panel array on the roof.
description_view_3: This view shows the rear and side of the building, emphasizing the continuous solar panel coverage and rooftop equipment.
attribute_panel_orientation: flat, fixed orientation, no visible tilt
attribute_mounting_structure_type: roof-mounted, likely supported by an aluminum frame integrated into the building roof
attribute_array_configuration: multiple rows forming a dense grid, approximately 6x10 panels
